goal: Implement Phase-A (50%) story expansion: add chapter 1 half-flow data, emit chapter bridge events, and wire StoryScreen for chapter progress/choice impact preview without changing core battle rules.
constraints: Only implement the agreed 50% scope; no new game features outside story flow and bridge wiring.
